allow: Bash(python -m flake8 core/ services/ routes/ app.py config.py --count --statistics)
Bash(python -m flake8 services/startup_tools.py routes/startup.py core/action_registry.py core/governance.py routes/__init__.py --max-line-length=120 --extend-ignore=E501)
Bash(python -c "from services.network_tools import get_manageable_adapters, enable_adapter, disable_adapter; print\('imports ok'\)")

Bash(python -c "from core.action_registry import registry; a=registry.get\('network.enable_adapter'\); b=registry.get\('network.disable_adapter'\); print\('enable:', a.action_id, a.requires_confirmation\); print\('disable:', b.action_id, b.requires_confirmation\)")

Bash(python -c "from core.governance import ROLLBACK_STRATEGIES; print\('enable:', ROLLBACK_STRATEGIES['network.enable_adapter']['classification']\); print\('disable:', ROLLBACK_STRATEGIES['network.disable_adapter']['classification']\)")
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Wave 2 Phase 2: Network adapter enable/disable management' --body ':*)
